elements.text:
Your friend is having a huge birthday party and most of the people in your group of friends will be there. You know you can't afford a gift for your friend.

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I feel happy to be around all of my friends.
I feel terrible, but decide the party will go on.
I feel enthusiastic about sharing my good energy.
I feel guilty for not bringing a present.
I'm a little sick to my stomach thinking about not being able to afford a gift, but remind myself that my friend will understand.
